header.searchPlaceholder: Press the Enter key to search for "skills"
header.searchDescription: Type a skill name, description, or snippet to fuzzy-search matching results.
header.searchDialogPlaceholder: Search by skill name, description, or keyword
header.searchEmptyDescription: Try another keyword, or jump into Explore to browse the full catalog.
header.searchFooter: Open a skill directly from the list, or continue into Explore for the full results page.

hero.desc: The premier destination to discover, download, and manage advanced AI skills. Enhance your workflow in one click.

library.title: My Skills
library.desc: Do not share your API key with others, or expose it in browser or other client-side code.
library.emptyDesc: Upload skills to your library to get started.

activity.title: Favorites
activity.desc: A saved list of skills you want to revisit, compare, or install later.

favorite.panelDescription: Add this skill to your favorites so it appears in your saved list.
favorite.emptyTitle: Your favorites list is still empty
favorite.emptyDescription: Save the skills you like from the detail page and they will appear here.

creative-writer.name: Story Architect
creative-writer.desc: A high-fidelity prompt engine for complex narrative generation and plot structuring.

code-optimizer.name: Logic Refactor
code-optimizer.desc: Advanced logic analyzer skill that optimizes runtime complexity and memory usage.

image-gen.name: Dream Visualizer
image-gen.desc: Visual synthesis module enabling latent-space diffusion for asset creation.

summarizer.name: Essence Extractor
summarizer.desc: Context-aware summarization module for multi-document semantic compression.

philosopher.name: Zen Thinker
philosopher.desc: Cognitive reasoning module designed for ethical analysis and abstract logic.

brand-genius.name: Brand Identity
brand-genius.desc: Marketing intelligence skill for multi-channel identity and naming synthesis.

auth.title: Sign in to Skills Hub
auth.subtitle: Connect your account to sync skills across devices
auth.secure: Secure, read-only access to your public repositories
auth.agree: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
